settings.heading: Why Lighting Matters?
settings.description: Poor lighting isn't just about aesthetics – it can affect everything from your mood to your productivity. Many people struggle with harsh overhead lights that create an uninviting atmosphere, or insufficient lighting that makes daily tasks difficult. The good news? Creating the perfect lighting scheme is both achievable and affordable, regardless of your living situation.

settings.content_html:
All LED Transformers & Power Supplies

Welcome to LEDSONE's extensive collection of LED transformers and power supplies, your one-stop shop for reliable and efficient lighting solutions. Whether you're powering intricate LED strips, modules, or low-voltage systems, our range ensures stable performance and optimal longevity for your LEDs. From compact constant current drivers to heavy-duty constant voltage switching power supplies, we offer a diverse selection tailored to every requirement, indoor or outdoor.

Explore our carefully curated categories below to find the perfect transformer for your next project. Our products are designed with safety features like overload, over-voltage, and short-circuit protection, giving you peace of mind with every installation. Upgrade your lighting setup with confidence and precision with LEDSONE.

18W-100W 12V DC Constant Voltage Indoor Transformers (IP20)

Discover our selection of 12V DC constant voltage transformers, perfect for a wide range of indoor LED lighting applications. These IP20-rated power supplies ensure stable operation for LED strips, modules, and other low-voltage systems, offering reliable performance with essential safety protections.

18W DC12V LED Driver Power Supply Transformer~3280

This compact 18W LED driver efficiently converts AC 110-240V to a stable DC 12V, ideal for small indoor LED projects. Featuring robust protection against short circuits, over voltage, and over current, it's a reliable choice for LED strips, modules, and other low-voltage lighting systems. It's non-waterproof and designed for indoor use.

28W Compact LED Driver AC 240V to DC12V Power Supply Transformer~3279

A compact 28W LED driver, converting AC 90-240V to a consistent 12V DC with 2A output. This non-waterproof, indoor-use transformer is equipped with essential protections against overcurrent, short circuit, and over-voltage, making it suitable for LED strips, G4, MR11, MR16/GU5.3 LED bulbs, and wireless routers.

100W Universal LED Power Supply Transformer 12V DC Led Transformer~3330

This 100W 12V DC transformer is a universal regulated switching power supply, perfect for indoor LED applications like flexible strips. With IP20 rating and comprehensive protection against overload, over voltage, and short circuits, it ensures a stable 12V output from AC 110-220V input for reliable and safe operation.

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of LED lighting can these 12V DC transformers power?

These 12V DC transformers are ideal for powering a variety of low-voltage LED applications, including LED strips, LED modules, G4/MR11/MR16/GU5.3 LED bulbs, and other devices requiring a stable 12V DC supply. For example, our 18W DC12V LED Driver is perfectly suited for compact indoor setups.

Are these 12V transformers safe for continuous use?

Yes, all our LED transformers, especially those designed for constant voltage, include multiple safety features such as short circuit protection, over-voltage protection, overload protection, and over-temperature protection to ensure safe and continuous operation. They are CE and RoHS certified for peace of mind.

Can I use these transformers for outdoor lighting projects?

The transformers in this specific section (IP20 rated) are generally designed for indoor use only. For outdoor applications, you would need to select models with a higher IP rating (e.g., IP65, IP67) that are explicitly described as waterproof or rainproof to ensure durability and safety in various weather conditions.

12V DC High Power Switching Transformers (240W-480W)

For more demanding LED installations, our high-power 12V DC switching transformers deliver robust and regulated power. These units, with wattages ranging from 240W to 480W, are equipped with enhanced heat dissipation and comprehensive safety features, suitable for larger indoor projects and even some outdoor applications where specified as waterproof.

AC 100/240V to DC12V 240W Regulated Switching Power Supply Driver ~3336

This 240W universal regulated switching power supply converts AC 100V/240V to a stable DC 12V with 20A output. Featuring a metal honeycomb design for efficient heat dissipation and built-in protections, it's suitable for industrial automation, LED displays, and larger LED strip lights. The product description indicates it is waterproof, making it a versatile option for both indoor and outdoor use.

AC 100/240V to DC12V 360W Regulated Switching Power Supply Driver ~3351

A powerful 360W universal regulated switching power supply, delivering 30A at 12V DC from an AC 100V-240V input. Its aluminum alloy shell with a honeycomb design enhances heat dissipation. Equipped with overload, over-voltage, and short-circuit protection, this transformer, noted as waterproof in its description, is suitable for robust LED installations, CCTV, and 3D printers, including outdoor applications.

DC12V 480W 40A Regulated Switching Power Supply Driver ~3350

This heavy-duty 480W switching power supply provides a stable 12V DC output with 40A current. Ideal for large-scale indoor LED projects and industrial automation, it features smart surge protection, a metal honeycomb design for superior heat dissipation, and is non-waterproof. It reliably powers demanding applications like LED displays and complex computer projects.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I select the correct wattage for my LED system?

Always choose an LED power supply with a wattage rating at least 25% higher than the total wattage required by your LED fixtures. For example, if your LED strip requires 75W, opt for a 100W or above transformer like one from our high-power All Transformers collection to ensure efficiency and longevity.

What does 'Regulated Switching Power Supply' mean?

A regulated switching power supply efficiently converts AC input voltage to a stable DC output voltage, maintaining consistent power delivery despite fluctuations in the input or load. This regulation is crucial for protecting sensitive electronics like LEDs from damage due to power spikes or drops.

Can these high-power units be used with dimmer switches?

Most of the regulated switching power supplies in this collection are non-dimmable. If you require dimming functionality, you will need to specifically look for 'dimmable LED drivers' or 'dimmable LED transformers' that are compatible with your chosen dimming system (e.g., TRIAC, 0-10V, DALI).

Multi-Voltage Constant Current LED Drivers (1W-50W)

Achieve consistent brightness and prolonged LED lifespan with our range of constant current LED drivers. These essential components provide a steady current output across varying voltage loads, ensuring optimal performance for individual LEDs and specific LED arrays. Available in multiple wattage and output voltage configurations, they cater to a broad spectrum of lighting designs.

1-3w DC 3V-12V 300mAmp LED Driver Constant Power Supply~3318

A compact and efficient 1-3W constant current LED driver, delivering 300mA for low-power LED applications. Accepting a wide input of AC 85-265V and outputting DC 3V-12V, this non-waterproof unit is perfect for indoor use with LED strips, modules, and small motors. It features comprehensive protection against short circuit, over voltage, over current, and over temperature.

5W DC 14-19V 280mAmp LED Driver Constant Current Transformer~3323

This 5W constant current LED driver delivers a precise 280mA current to ensure consistent brightness and longevity for your LEDs. Converting AC 100-265V to DC 14-19V, it's suitable for various indoor LED lighting projects, including strip lights, G4, MR11, and MR16 bulbs. Built from durable plastic, it provides essential protection against overheating, overload, and short circuits.

36-50W DC 108–200V 300mAmp LED Power Supply Transformer~3310

A high-power constant current LED driver designed for robust LED installations, offering 300mA output across a wide DC 108-200V range. This non-waterproof, indoor-use transformer is ideal for larger LED strips, modules, and bulbs, ensuring consistent performance. It comes with full safety protections and a 3-year warranty for lasting reliability.

Frequently Asked Questions

Why is a constant current LED driver important for certain applications?

Constant current LED drivers are vital for maintaining a consistent current flow to LEDs, which directly impacts their brightness and prevents damage from fluctuating voltage. This is especially important for high-power LEDs and multi-LED arrays where uniform brightness and extended lifespan are critical. Our 1-3W DC 3V-12V 300mAmp LED Driver is an excellent example for precise low-power applications.

Can constant current drivers be used with all types of LEDs?

Constant current drivers are specifically designed for LEDs that require a fixed current, typically referred to as 'constant current' LEDs. Using them with 'constant voltage' LEDs (like many LED strips) can lead to damage. Always check the specifications of your LED fixtures to determine if they require a constant current or constant voltage driver.

Do these drivers include temperature protection?

Yes, many of our constant current LED drivers, such as the 1-3W and 5W models, feature over-temperature protection. This safety mechanism automatically shuts down or reduces power if the driver's internal temperature exceeds a safe limit, protecting both the driver and the connected LEDs from heat-related damage.

Specialized 5V & 24V DC Constant Voltage Transformers (Indoor)

For projects requiring specific low-voltage outputs, our specialized 5V and 24V DC constant voltage transformers offer precise and stable power. Ideal for unique electronic setups, industrial control systems, LED displays, and other niche applications, these indoor-rated units provide the exact power requirements you need with built-in safety features.

150W 30A Switching Power Supply 110V/220V to 5V IP20 Transformer ~ 3278

This 150W IP20 transformer efficiently converts AC 110V-220V to a steady 5V DC with a robust 30A output. Made with a durable aluminum shell for heat dissipation, it includes smart surge protection for circuit shortage, overload, and over-voltage. Ideal for industrial automation, LED displays, 3D printers, and various computer projects requiring a precise 5V power supply for indoor environments.

48W 2A DC24V IP20 Constant Voltage power supply Transformer~3299

A reliable 48W IP20 constant voltage switching power supply, converting AC 110V/220V to a stable 24V DC at 2A. Designed for indoor use, it's perfect for low-voltage LED strip lights, RGB LED strips, and various industrial applications that require a precise 24V supply. It offers comprehensive protection against overload, over-voltage, and short circuits, ensuring safe operation without a cooling fan for lower wattage models.

Frequently Asked Questions

When would I need a 5V or 24V LED transformer instead of a 12V one?

5V and 24V LED transformers are chosen based on the specific voltage requirements of your LED products or electronic components. Many LED displays, certain smart home devices, and specialized industrial automation require 5V, while longer LED strip runs or particular LED fixtures might use 24V to minimize voltage drop and increase efficiency. Our 150W 5V IP20 Transformer is ideal for these specialized 5V needs.

Are these specialized transformers safe and certified?

Yes, all our specialized 5V and 24V transformers, like others in our range, come with essential safety certifications such as CE and RoHS. They feature built-in protections against overcurrent, short circuits, and over-voltage, ensuring a secure and reliable power supply for your sensitive electronics and LED setups.

What applications are best suited for a 24V transformer?

24V transformers are particularly advantageous for longer runs of LED strip lighting, as the higher voltage helps to reduce voltage drop over distance, ensuring more uniform brightness along the entire strip. They are also common in professional lighting installations, automotive LED lighting, and some industrial control systems.
